hero.title: An AI-first lending platform built in-house
hero.subtitle: Our technology stack is purpose-built for secured MSME lending — from origination and underwriting to collections and partner integrations.

items.title: AI-native platform
items.desc: Decisioning models trained on Indian MSME data combining bureau, banking, GST, and alternate signals.

items.title: Modern data stack
items.desc: Cloud-native data infrastructure powering risk, portfolio analytics and real-time monitoring.

items.title: Digital origination
items.desc: End-to-end workflow from lead capture and KYC to sanction, e-agreement and disbursal.

items.title: Partner integrations
items.desc: APIs for co-lending partners, DSAs, and data providers. Programmable integrations on roadmap.

items.title: Security & compliance
items.desc: RBI-aligned controls, ISO-grade information security practices, and data-residency in India.

items.title: Tech team culture
items.desc: Small, senior engineering team shipping weekly. Hiring across platform, ML and data engineering.

sections.title: Join the tech team
sections.subtitle: We're hiring engineers who want to build consequential fintech from the ground up. Small team, big impact, weekly shipping.
